comments:
Scroll - scroll state, inertia, and snap points.

Models scroll behavior for hyper-responsive interfaces.
Supports inertial scrolling, overscroll, and snap points.

## Dependencies
- Prelude (Eq, Ord, Show)
- Hydrogen.Math.Core (abs, clamp)

## Dependents
- Component.* (scrollable components)
- Interaction.InfiniteScroll
- Interaction.PullToRefresh

declarations.comments: Alias for scrollY (common DOM property name)
declarations.title: scrollTop

declarations.comments: Alias for scrollX (common DOM property name)
declarations.title: scrollLeft

declarations.comments: Scroll delta from wheel or touch events
declarations.title: ScrollDelta

declarations.comments:
Normalize delta to pixels

Line = 16px, Page = viewport height (estimated at 800px)
declarations.title: normalizeDelta

declarations.comments: Calculate progress from position and bounds
declarations.title: progressFromPosition

declarations.comments: Is at start of scrollable area?
declarations.title: isAtStart

declarations.comments: Is at end of scrollable area?
declarations.title: isAtEnd

declarations.comments: Clamp position to valid scroll bounds
declarations.title: clampToScrollBounds

declarations.comments: Can scroll up from current position?
declarations.title: canScrollUp

declarations.comments: Can scroll down from current position?
declarations.title: canScrollDown

declarations.comments: Can scroll left from current position?
declarations.title: canScrollLeft

declarations.comments: Can scroll right from current position?
declarations.title: canScrollRight

declarations.comments:
Apply resistance to overscroll (diminishing returns)

Uses 1/(1+x) curve for natural rubber-band feel.
declarations.title: applyOverscrollResistance

declarations.comments: Find nearest snap point to position
declarations.title: findNearestSnap

declarations.comments: Should snap to point based on proximity threshold?
declarations.title: shouldSnap

declarations.comments: Infinite scroll state for loading more content
declarations.title: InfiniteScrollState

declarations.comments: Should trigger load based on scroll state?
declarations.title: shouldLoadMore

declarations.comments: Default pull to refresh (64px threshold, 128px max)
declarations.title: defaultPullToRefresh

declarations.comments: Can pull to refresh from current scroll position?
declarations.title: canPullToRefresh

declarations.comments: Release pull (triggers refresh if past threshold)
declarations.title: releasePull

name: Hydrogen.Schema.Gestural.Scroll
